text.paragraph:
FNBR 42746048 Date(s): 3/22/23 - 3/22/23
Virginia Mason Issaquah 100 NE Gilman Blvd Issaquah, WA 98027- US (425) 557-8000
Discharge Disposition: *Home (01)

Encounter Type: Clinic -Z Office Visit

Location: UV Video Visit
Appointment Type: Ped Behavioral Video Visit New

Ordering provider: Soong MD, Derrick L

item.paragraph:
Soong MD, Derrick L: PERFORM
Event Display: PEDS Outpt Clinic Note
Authored Date: 20230322103718-0700

Assessment/Plan
_
1. Pneumonia J18.9
Symptoms significantly improved, lots of energy noted today compared to 2 days ago.
Lungs more clear, but with some intermittent wheezes, will have Dad do some Albuterol at home with a spacer as needed for the next couple of days.
Ok to return to school, has had 5 doses of antibiotics.
Discussed returning PRN.
Orders:
Albuterol (Eqv-ProAir HFA) 90 mcg/inh inhalation aerosol, 2 puff(s), ORAL INH, Q6 Hours, PRN Wheezing, # 1 EA
Spacer for MDI, Spacer for MDI, 1, EA, ORAL INH, ONCE, # 1 EA, As directed with MDI
Chief Complaint
Pneumonia follow up
History of Present Illness
Laurence was seen by me 2 days ago and diagnosed with pneumonia and put on amoxicillin.
They gave him 2 doses the day I saw him. He has now had 5 doses.
Cough seems to have improved.
He has been wanting to use the bathroom every 10 minutes.
He stooled yesterday, and wasn't hard.
No dysuria, but some increased frequency.
Increased frequency happened about 2 weeks ago, and then resolved and came back.
Review of Systems
Pertinent systems reviewed and negative except as per HPI
Physical Exam
Vitals & Measurements
T: 97.7 °F
WT: 15.80 kg
CONSTITUTIONAL: Alert, interactive, and non-toxic in appearance.
EARS: Bilateral TM's normal in appearance.
HENT: mucus membranes moist without lesions or exudates, no pharyngeal erythema
RESPIRATORY: CTAB, no wheezing, no rhonchi, No respiratory distress
CARDIOVASCULAR: S1, S2, no murmurs or extra sounds
GASTROINTESTINAL: soft, nontender, nondistended
MUSCULOSKELETAL: No joint or extremity swelling. Moves all extremities symmetrically without pain.
SKIN: No rashes or lesions
NEUROLOGIC: Normal mental status, strength, and tone.
External Vitals & Measurements
No qualifying data available.
Growth Percentiles
Weight Percentile: 5.06 % (03/22/23 10:24:00)
Hearing and Vision Screenings
No qualifying data available.
Problem List/Past Medical History
Ongoing
Abdominal pain
Birth mark Comments: forehead
Chromosomal microduplication
Hemangioma
Prematurity
Strabismus
Underweight in childhood
Historical
No qualifying data
Medications
Albuterol (Eqv-ProAir HFA) 90 mcg/inh inhalation aerosol, 2 puff(s), ORAL INH, Q6 Hours, PRN
amoxicillin 400 mg/5 mL oral liquid, 712 mg= 8.9 mL, PO, Q12 Hours
Spacer for MDI, 1 EA, ORAL INH, ONCE
Vitamin D, Daily
Allergies
NKA
Social History
Home/Environment
Lives with Father, Mother, Siblings, Grandmother.
Family History
Allergies: Mother and Father.
Anxiety: Mother.
Depression: Mother.
Diabetes mellitus type 2: Sister.
Eczema: Father and Pat. GFather.
Health Maintenance
Pending (in the next year)
There are no current recommendations pending
Due In Future
Ped - well child check not due until 12/19/23 and every 1 year(s)
Satisfied (in the past 1 year)
Satisfied
Ped - well child check on 12/19/22. Satisfied by Soong MD, Derrick L
(Electronically Signed on 03/22/23 10:37 AM)
Soong MD, Derrick L
